ticket.subject: URGENT: Database credentials exposed in Docker image registry
ticket.body: Critical security incident: Our production database credentials were accidentally baked into a Docker image that was pushed to our public Docker Hub repository approximately 2 hours ago. While the image has been deleted, the credentials were definitely exposed during that window. We require immediate rotation of all database user passwords and a comprehensive audit of all database connections and queries executed since the exposure time. Please treat this as an active security breach.
